title: Bridge Essay: Deep Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM-Attention Model for EEG Classification Using Wavelet Features.
concept: Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Deep Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM-Attention Model for EEG Classification Using Wavelet Features.** - Ann Neurosci (2026). DOI: 10.1177/09727531251396337. PMID: 41589310. BACKGROUND AND PURPOSE: Electroencephalography (EEG) is a popular non-invasive method for studying brain dynamics because of its excellent temporal resolution. However, the non-stationarity, intersubject variability and class imbalance of EEG data, make it difficult to automatically discriminate between brain states that correspond to various cognitive or sensory circumstances.
